query: when was the last Summer Olympics held which city hosted
answer: The last Summer Olympics were held in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil, in 2016. The next Summer Olympics will be in Paris, France, in 2024. Los Angeles, California, will host the Summer Olympics in 2028.

results.title: List of Olympic Host Cities – Architecture of the Games
results.snippet: # List of Olympic Host Cities. #### Summer Olympic Games. * 1904  St. Louis, United States. * 1916  Cancelled (WWI – Berlin had been awarded). * 1932  Los Angeles, United States. * 1940 Cancelled (WWII – Tokyo had been awarded). * 1944 Cancelled (WWII – London had been awarded). * 1984  Los Angeles, United States. * 2016  Rio de Janeiro, Brazil. * 2020  Tokyo, Japan (postponed to 2021 due to the coronavirus pandemic). * 2028  Los Angeles, United States. #### Winter Olympic Games. * 1932  Lake Placid, United States. * 1940  Cancelled (WWII – Sapporo had been awarded). * 1944  Cancelled (WWII – Cortina d’Ampezzo had been awarded). * 1956  Cortina d’Ampezzo, Italy. * 1960  Squaw Valley, United States. * 1980  Lake Placid, United States. * 2002  Salt Lake City, United States. * 2026  Milan – Cortina d’Ampezzo, Italy. * 2034  Salt Lake City – Utah, United States. *Read more: List of Paralympic Host Cities*.
